mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 179 > factions > Dark coffees are popular drink as are liqueurs
mechanics.excerpt: Dark coffees are popular drink as are liqueurs and ouzO With eye toward profit mar gins_ the League exports some of the most prized foodstuffs in Inner Sphere most notably the tart kincha fruit the Capellan Confederation and Niihau honey to the Lyran Alliance_ The Capellan Confederation depends on rice for the same reason that ancient Cathay on Terra did: acre for acre more people can be fed on rice than on other grains_ Slivers of meat fish; traditionally prepared_ spice up the meal and reinforce the Confederation Chinese heritage_ Soups and noodles are also favorite food items Other popular cuisines include Indian and Russian, Tea and rice wines are the mos common drinks_ general; only the upper castes can afford the more expensive plum wines The Confederation one the few states ever to outlaw certain foods Chief among those was the kincha fruit, which grew only on the world of Shuen Wan When House Marik con quered that planet; Maximillian Liao banned the kincha.
